title: sqlite-graphrag migrate --rehash response
description: JSON contract for the `migrate --rehash --json` subcommand added in v1.0.76. Rewrites recorded migration checksums in refinery_schema_history to match the current migration file content using SipHasher13. Required for v1.0.74 databases upgrading to v1.0.76 because V002 was intentionally emptied to a no-op.

rewritten.description: Number of migration rows whose checksum was rewritten to match the current file content.

skipped.description: Number of migration rows that already had a matching checksum and required no rewrite.

errors.description: Per-migration errors encountered during the rewrite. Empty when the database was healthy.

namespace.description: Active namespace at the time of the operation. Null when the database is uninitialized.

db_path.description: Absolute path of the database file that was processed.
